cases.description: Adding an MCP server triggers the skill
cases.prompt: add the GitHub MCP server to my setup
expectations: Uses ${VAR_NAME} syntax for GITHUB_TOKEN — no hardcoded secrets
Runs `codi generate` to distribute to all agents

cases.description: Failed MCP tool call triggers the skill
cases.prompt: my MCP tool call is failing — the server just says connection refused
expectations: Walks through the Troubleshooting table (server not running, URL wrong, missing env var)
Points at MCP Inspector for isolating the issue

cases.description: Custom MCP server build triggers the skill
cases.prompt: I want to build a custom MCP server for our internal API
expectations: Reads references/building-custom-servers.md for the full guide
Walks through Research → Implement → Review → Evals phases

cases.description: Generic REST API question does NOT trigger mcp-ops
cases.prompt: design a REST API for our user service
expectations: Routes to a general API-design flow (codi-api-designer agent or direct)

cases.description: Anthropic SDK question does NOT trigger mcp-ops
cases.prompt: I want to use the Claude API with tool use
expectations: Does NOT configure an MCP server
